grouping_identity_boundary: Grouping and identity refs may inform display factors only; no destructive merge, duplicate deletion, truth claim, or candidate promotion is performed.
current_order_fallback_model: Current order is preserved outside dry-run. Missing factor data, policy rejection, invalid input, or missing explanation requires current-order fallback; strict mode can fail but still performs no mutation.
explanation_user_reason_model: Every proposed dry-run ranking change receives a public reason and audit reason with visible match, evidence, source, compatibility, gap, action, and risk caveats where available.
mutation_promotion_boundary: Report-only dry-run; no source cache writes, evidence ledger writes, candidate index writes, public/local/master index writes, candidate promotion, accepted records, destructive merge, or duplicate deletion.

notes: Production ranking claims remain blocked by external baseline and eval-gate readiness.
No public search route, response, card, or ordering behavior was changed.
privacy_no_telemetry_hidden_score_review: Public-safe synthetic examples only; no raw private query, IP/account/session/user-profile data, telemetry, popularity, ad signal, model signal, hidden score, suppression, private path, private URL, or local machine fingerprint.
public_search_boundary: Public search does not call this dry-run runtime; routes, responses, result cards, ordering, and safety checks are unchanged.
remaining_blockers: External baseline comparison is not eligible for production-quality ranking claims.
Dedicated ranking regression acceptance remains future.
Public search ranking integration requires separate approval.
runtime_scope: Implemented stdlib-only local dry-run ranking over approved examples; no public search integration, hosted runtime, hidden scores, suppression, model calls, telemetry, source/evidence reads, or mutation.
source_cache_evidence_candidate_boundary: Dry-run may read synthetic refs present in examples only; it does not read authoritative source cache or evidence ledger, write source/evidence/candidate stores, create candidates, promote candidates, or accept refs as truth.
